name: @worthlane/desktop-native
description: Secure native Windows shell for the Worthlane desktop workspace

scripts.typecheck: node --check src/main.cjs && node --check src/navigation.cjs && node --check src/security.cjs && node --check src/offline.js && node --check scripts/write-config.cjs && node --check scripts/verify-origin.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-package.cjs && node --check scripts/after-pack.cjs && node --check scripts/dev.mjs
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/verify-origin.mjs && node scripts/write-config.cjs && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 && node scripts/verify-package.cjs --production
